related_files: kernel/graph-foundation/tests/diff_correctness.rs — working-tree newline normalization CRLF→LF; correction-round mechanical line-ending-only change so `cargo +nightly fmt --all -- --check` accepts the file. No Rust source, no test behavior, no semantics, no byte other than the stripped 0x0D bytes were changed. The file's index-stored bytes (`git ls-files -s`) are already LF (`a9f1dad9a91a94798811700f4427d3cf99ff1fbc`); the CRLF in the working copy came from Windows-side `core.autocrlf=true` smudging on checkout, not from the file as committed.
